privacy.title: Privacy Policy
intro: {{company}} ("we", "us", or "our") operates a construction and trade services marketplace connecting property owners with qualified professionals in Ibiza. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
bullets: Account information (name, email address, phone number)
Profile details you provide (business name, service areas, bio)
Job posting content (descriptions, photos, location preferences)
Usage data (pages visited, features used, device information)

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
bullets: To operate and improve the platform
To match clients with suitable professionals
To ensure platform safety and prevent fraud

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal data. We share information only with: service providers who help us operate the platform, professionals or clients you choose to connect with, and authorities when required by law.

sections.title: 4. Cookies & Analytics
paragraphs: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We may use analytics tools to understand how users interact with the platform. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
paragraphs: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us through our <contactLink>contact page</contactLink>.

sections.title: 6. Data Security
paragraphs: We use industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

sections.title: 7. Contact
paragraphs: For privacy-related questions, please reach out via our <contactLink>contact page</contactLink> or email us at <emailLink>{{email}}</emailLink>.

terms.title: Terms of Service
intro: Welcome to {{company}}. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

sections.title: 1. Platform Role
paragraphs: {{company}} ("the Platform") provides a digital infrastructure that facilitates:
bullets1: Introductions between clients and construction professionals
paragraphs2: The Platform acts solely as an intermediary and system facilitator.
The Platform does not:
bullets2: Act as a contractor or subcontractor
Supervise or manage physical construction work
Operate as a bank, escrow provider, or financial institution
paragraphs3: All agreements are made directly between the Client (Asker) and the Professional (Tasker).

sections.title: 2. User Responsibility
paragraphs: Users are responsible for ensuring:
bullets: All project details are accurate and agreed before work begins
Milestones, timelines, and expectations are clearly defined
Communication is conducted through the platform where possible
Both parties cooperate in good faith
paragraphs2: Clients and Professionals are independent parties. The Platform does not employ, represent, or act on behalf of either party.

sections.title: 3. Payment Terms
paragraphs: All payments must follow a structured milestone-based system, which may include:
paragraphs2: Payments are processed through regulated third-party payment providers. Funds relating to pending milestones may remain within the payment processing system until:
paragraphs3: The Platform does not directly hold or custody funds outside of the payment processing system.

Payments are released when milestone completion is confirmed by the client, no dispute is raised within the response period, or resolution is reached through the dispute process. If a user fails to respond within 72 hours, the Platform may proceed based on available evidence.
Funds that have already been released are no longer controlled by the Platform and cannot be reversed unless mutually agreed.
The Platform reserves the right to set transaction limits, require alternative or hybrid payment methods for higher-value projects, and refuse or restrict high-risk transactions.

sections.title: 4. Dispute & Resolution Terms
paragraphs: Disputes must be raised within 28 days of the relevant milestone or project stage. The Platform provides a structured resolution process including:
paragraphs2: The Platform facilitates resolution but does not act as a court, arbitrator, or legally binding adjudicator. You can read the full dispute policy here: <disputeLink>/dispute-policy</disputeLink>.
During an active dispute, pending milestone funds may be temporarily restricted. Previously released funds remain outside Platform control.
Payment outcomes are determined based on evidence, project scope, industry standards, and communication records.
paragraphs3: Possible outcomes include corrective work completion, partial payment allocation, shared responsibility outcome, independent expert review, or structured settlement. All outcomes are documented and finalised within the defined process.
If a party fails to engage, the Platform may proceed based on available evidence and the outcome may be issued without further input.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: The Platform's liability is strictly limited to the service fees paid for the relevant project.
The Platform is not liable for:
bullets: Disputes between parties outside platform control
paragraphs2: The Platform does not guarantee project outcomes, workmanship quality, or user behaviour. Users are solely responsible for their own agreements, compliance with applicable laws, and due diligence.

sections.title: 6. Construction Variability
paragraphs: Users acknowledge that construction projects may involve:
bullets: Delays due to weather or supply
paragraphs2: Not all issues constitute a breach or failure. The dispute process considers standard construction tolerances and local conditions.

sections.title: 7. User Conduct
paragraphs: Users must not:
bullets: Attempt to bypass the platform payment structure
Post false, misleading, or fraudulent content
Use the platform for services unrelated to construction and trades
paragraphs2: We reserve the right to suspend or remove accounts that repeatedly deliver substandard work, engage in fraudulent behaviour, abuse the dispute process, or withhold payment without documented justification.

sections.title: 8. Legal Framework
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws of Spain. Either party may pursue legal action independently. The Platform may provide documentation of the case upon request.

We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. Material changes will be communicated via email or platform notification.
If you have questions about these Terms, please reach out via our <contactLink>contact page</contactLink> or email us at <emailLink>{{email}}</emailLink>.

dispute.title: 28-Day Fair Resolution & Payment Protection Policy
dispute.intro: This policy applies to jobs arranged through {{company}} between clients (Askers) and professionals (Taskers).

sections.title: 1. Purpose of This Policy
paragraphs: {{company}} provides a structured and neutral dispute facilitation process for construction projects arranged through the platform.
This policy is designed to:
paragraphs2: {{company}} does not perform construction work, supervise works, or act as a court or arbitrator. Our role is limited to platform-based facilitation and governance.

sections.title: 2. Payment Protection Framework
paragraphs: Payments processed through the platform are handled via regulated third-party payment infrastructure.
Payment is directly linked to milestone completion, documented progress, or structured resolution outcomes. This ensures:
bullets: Clients do not pay ahead of progress
Professionals are not exposed to arbitrary withholding
Payment decisions follow a controlled system
Funds may be temporarily held or frozen during active dispute review
Release of funds occurs only in accordance with agreed resolution terms
paragraphs2: Pending milestone funds may be restricted during disputes. Previously released funds are not automatically reversible.
{{company}} does not guarantee recovery of funds already released prior to a dispute.

sections.title: 4. What Constructive Solutions Does Not Provide
5. The 28-Day Resolution Pathway
paragraphs: All disputes follow a structured six-stage process.

stages.title: Stage 0 — Pre-Dispute Prevention
paragraphs: Purpose: Prevent unnecessary escalation. Many issues are simply communication gaps, minor defects, or timing frustrations.
The platform provides:
paragraphs2: Many issues resolve here without formal dispute.

stages.title: Stage 1 — Issue Raised (Days 1–3)
paragraphs: Either party submits a dispute including:
paragraphs2: The platform opens a structured case, stabilises communication, activates timeline visibility, confirms payment status, and defines next steps.
All pending funds remain protected during this stage.

stages.title: Stage 2 — Evidence Collection (Days 4–10)
paragraphs: Both parties may submit:
paragraphs2: The platform enforces equal submission windows, builds a neutral case file, and identifies missing information. This shifts disputes from opinion to evidence.

stages.title: Stage 3 — Technical & Commercial Assessment (Days 11–17)
paragraphs: The platform conducts a structured assessment based on:
paragraphs2: Where required, independent specialists may be introduced. Structured findings and outcome pathways are prepared.
The platform may issue a non-binding recommendation to assist resolution.

stages.title: Stage 4 — Resolution Pathways (Days 18–24)
paragraphs: Four structured routes are provided:
bullets: A. Corrective Work — work is completed or corrected before payment release
B. Financial Adjustment — funds are distributed proportionately to completed work
C. Shared Responsibility — balanced outcome where accountability is mixed
D. Independent Expert Outcome — specialist input determines final allocation
paragraphs2: All outcomes include clear actions. Any agreement must be confirmed in writing within the platform before fund release.

stages.title: Stage 5 — Final Resolution (Days 25–28)
paragraphs: Possible outcomes:
bullets: Conditional completion — release after final work
paragraphs2: Every case reaches a defined conclusion. A limited procedural review may be requested within five (5) days only where new material evidence becomes available.

sections.title: 6. Participation Requirements
paragraphs: To maintain efficiency:
bullets: Parties are expected to respond within 48 hours to platform requests
After 72 hours of non-response, the platform may proceed based on available information
paragraphs2: Non-response does not automatically determine outcome but may limit that party's contribution.

sections.title: 7. Professional Reputation Protection
paragraphs: Where a dispute is resolved in favour of the professional (Tasker):
bullets: Reviews directly contradicting documented findings may be moderated
Repeated unfounded disputes by clients (Askers) may result in warnings or suspension
paragraphs2: Completion metrics are not penalised for unsubstantiated claims.

sections.title: 8. Client Protection
paragraphs: Clients (Askers) are protected through:
paragraphs2: No pending funds are released during active dispute review.

sections.title: 9. Construction Reality Guidance
paragraphs: Users are reminded that normal construction variables may include:
paragraphs2: These factors are considered during review.

sections.title: 10. Platform Role Clarification
paragraphs: {{company}}:
bullets: Does not act as a court or arbitrator
paragraphs2: All contractual responsibility remains between client and professional.
Platform recommendations are non-binding unless mutually accepted.

sections.title: 11. Objective
paragraphs: This system combines structured payment control, construction-specific dispute resolution, neutral documented assessment, and defined financial outcomes.
It is designed to reduce conflict, protect both sides, maintain trust, and create clear and fair conclusions.
The objective of this framework is not to assign blame, but to deliver Constructive Solutions.
